# Taxonomia Project — Architecture Index
<!-- Auto-generated by rai-discover S2026-03-27. Under 2K tokens. -->

## System Overview

**What:** A metadata-driven Governance SPA built on Google Apps Script + Google Sheets implementing SAFe 6.0 portfolio taxonomy management.

**Who:** Product Leaders, Enterprise Architects, PMs within the organization.

**Why:** Replaces error-prone spreadsheets with a relational, schema-validated Single Source of Truth with Zero-Touch UI, Time-Travel audit trails, and 0ms reactivity.

## Module Map

| Module | Category | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| `Data_Schemas` | schema | APP_SCHEMAS — The metadata brain. All entity definitions live here. |
| `GAS_Server` | service | doGet/doPost + API_Universal_Router RPC gateway. |
| `DB_Layer` | service | Engine_DB Façade → Adapter_Sheets (Sheets ORM) + Adapter_CloudDB. |
| `UI_Shell` | service | Bootstrap: AuthManager, ThemeManager, SPA router, 3-state sidebar. |
| `DataView_Engine` | handler | Zero-latency in-memory data grid. Reads `window.__APP_CACHE__`. |
| `Form_Engine` | handler | Reactive multi-step form builder + Adjacency List hierarchy engine. |
| `Dashboard_UI` | handler | ApexCharts KPI dashboard mined from in-memory cache. |
| `DesignKit_UI` | utility | Living design system token showcase. |
| `Test_Suite` | test | Jest + GAS unit tests for hierarchy and persistence logic. |

## Dependency Flow

```
Data_Schemas (no deps)
  ↓
GAS_Server → DB_Layer → Adapter_Sheets (Google Sheets)
  ↓               ↑
UI_Shell → DataView_Engine
  ↓           ↓
Form_Engine (reads APP_SCHEMAS, writes via API_Universal_Router)
```

## Key Constraints (Guardrails)

| ID | Rule |
|----|------|
| GR-01 | Engine_DB is a pure router — no direct SpreadsheetApp calls |
| GR-02 | Every write must Dual-Write to Sheets + CloudDB |
| GR-03 | Headers are always snake_case in Adapter_Sheets |
| GR-04 | UI components are exclusively Ionic Web Components |
| GR-05 | Multi-step forms use ion-stepper (Progressive Disclosure) |
| GR-06 | Every schema entity is an Object with a `fields` array |
| GR-07 | Audit fields (created_at, updated_at) are always server-injected |

## Key Architecture Decisions

- **APP_SCHEMAS as SSOT:** Schema-driven UI eliminates per-entity form boilerplate
- **Global Prefetch:** Single `getAppBootstrapPayload()` RPC loads all entities at boot → zero-latency subsequent reads
- **Adjacency List Hierarchy (S4.x):** `id_dominio_padre` FK guarantees referential integrity over string-based Materialized Path heuristics
- **Debounce (S4.3):** 300ms guard on ionInput/ionChange prevents Event Loop saturation
